title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes:
Game doesn't immediately launch due to the game wanting to see the Paradox launcher installed.  Go to /SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Age of Wonders Planetfall/ and rename dowser.exe to orig_dowser.exe.   Then copy the AowPF.exe.  Paste the copy into the same folder and rename that to dowser.exe.  Game should boot up fine from there.  Did not test Multiplayer.  Started up a random scenario, moved units around and clicked a few turns.  No graphics, sound, or frame rate issues observed.
Credit goes to Trias for finding the work around: https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/index.php?threads/request-is-the-game-working-with-proton.1229615/
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes:
Cant run game after install due to launcher needing .net
but if you go to the game folder and remove dowser.exe and then rename AowPF.exe to dowser.exe the game starts and works without trouble bypassing the launcher

notes:
Installing the Paradox Launcher fails during first time setup.

You can start the game manually with "cd ~/.steam/steamapps/common/Age\ of\ Wonders\ Planetfall/ && STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH=~/.steam/steamapps/compatdata/718850 ~/.steam/steamapps/common/Proton\ 4.11/proton run AowPF.exe" to bypass the faulty install.

title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes: The game will not install the paradox launcher which fails with error 1603. It is possible to run the game on Linux by not using proton and running steam under wine (with for example lutris dxvk and wine 4.11). Then adding the games binary directly to steam as an external program. That will skip the launcher. The issue seems to only be the paradox launcher and not the actual game. It is probably also possible to just rename the files so proton steam would start the game and not try to start installing/starting the paradox launcher but I cannot try that because I do not know what name the launcher.exe would have.
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes:
To launch and play the game, the following workaround from Trias_456 did the job for me: "You need to rename dowser.exe file in /SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Age of Wonders Planetfall/ to something like _dowser.exe. After it make a copy of AowPF.exe file and rename this copy to dowser.exe. Then launch the game from steam."
Link to the paradox forum thread where I found this: https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/index.php?threads/request-is-the-game-working-with-proton.1229615/
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes: launch options: DO=(%command%); "${DO[@]/%dowser.exe/AowPF.exe}"
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes:
Rename "dowser.exe" within the the application directory to something else and then rename "AowPF.exe" to "dowser.exe".

This skips the Paradox Launcher, which doesn't work right now, but lets you play the game without issues.
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes:
You need to install the game and try to launch it once. On first launch Steam will install needed bunch of software like DirectX and then try to install Paradox Launcher. Paradox Launcher installation will fail, but it’s O. K, you don’t really need the launcher to play the game. So:


1) Go to installation folder. Likely  /SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Age of Wonders Planetfall/
2) Locate file named “dowser.exe” and rename it to “_dowser.exe” or any other name you like. The renamed file is more like a backup copy, it won’t be used.
3) Locate file named “AowPF.exe” and make a copy of it.
4) Rename that copy to “dowser.exe”.
5) You are done. Just launch the game from Steam. :).

After this manipulations the game (single player) was tested during 2 days (about 5 hours in sum). Work flawlessly.

Multiplayer not tested.
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall

notes: Game runs well, after a workaround: go to the game folder (accessible via "Properties" -> "Local files"), backup dowser.exe and AowPF.exe (make copies called dowser.exe.backup and AowPF.exe.backup or something). Now rename AowPF.exe to dowser.exe. Now you can launch your game via steam. Have fun! Hopefully, devs will adress this at some point.
title: Age of Wonders: Planetfall
